title: Phase 6A: Yard module - service, API, task pages, workload board, bay status
description: Build yard module backend and primary UI: yard service with task queue, assignment, completion, and bay status management; API routes; mobile-first my-tasks page; manager workload board; and bay status board.
steps: Create src/lib/services/yard.service.ts with task queue management, assignment, completion, bay status tracking
Create src/app/api/yard/tasks/route.ts with GET (queue) and POST (create task)
Create src/app/api/yard/tasks/[id]/route.ts with GET, PUT (assign, start, complete)
Create src/app/api/yard/bays/route.ts with bay status management
Create src/app/(dashboard)/yard/page.tsx with mobile-first my-tasks page (swipe actions)
Create src/app/(dashboard)/yard/workload/page.tsx with manager workload board (desktop view)
Create src/components/yard/bay-status.tsx with bay status board visualization
